pool_name.description: Name of the tape pool, must be unique within the account and region.

retention_lock_time_in_days.description: Specifies the number of days for the retention lock, ensuring tapes cannot be deleted or modified during this period. Must be a positive integer.

retention_lock_type.description: "Specifies the type of retention lock for the tape pool; valid values are 'COMPLIANCE' or 'GOVERNANCE'."

storage_class.description: Specifies the storage class for the tape pool; must be either "DEEP_ARCHIVE" or "GLACIER".

tags.description: Key-value pairs for tagging the tape pool, used to organize and manage resources.
